reviews.review_description:
I’m a huge fan of strategy games in VR. This one isn’t very good.

The way you select and move units is too annoying. Also only 10 maps to play with no storyline.

developer_response.body: Thanks for feedback. Some people prefer this kind of controls, but we understand that there is no way of pleasing everyone. And game never promised storyline.

reviews.review_description:
I was waiting for such a game. It looks nice, all the buildings, units and terrain reminds me of some computer strategies.
If you just start, then read the tutorial first, it's much easier. I also suggest changing settings so player moves faster.
The only thing that is missing in the tutorial, is the information, that villager is needed to open treasure.

For this price it's a really good game. There is 10 nice maps, with different topology. I think number of units for VR game is decent, I like the catapult and fire arrows.
Just for everyone: peace time is for other players, not for those units that are hidden in the woods, they will attack you immediately. Treasures are marked on the map, as well those free units, so watch out.

I can walk, I can fly, I can teleport - I love it.
It seems, that .5 is the natural speed, if you set it to 3 then everything is ultra fast - use it when you wait for something.
I use 0.1 when I need to make a lot of commands, during battles 0.5.
